title: Catalog data grid
description: The Plata Burrito catalog at /catalog is a product data grid over GET /api/products?page&pageSize&sort&category&q. It ignores the URL on load (deep-links/back-forward don't restore page+sort+category+q), doesn't reset to page 1 on filter change, re-fetches with no cache/stale-while-revalidate, lets a slower response overwrite a newer one, and reports all empty results the same way. Full bug + Definition of Done live in JIRA-0321 (jira MCP).
acceptance: page, sort, category, and q all live in the URL and are read on init (deep-linkable).
Changing a filter or sort resets to page 1 and updates the URL.
React to route changes (back/forward) by reloading the state.
Default page to 1 when absent/invalid; never send an undefined/NaN/<1 page.
A stale (slower, older) response never overwrites a newer one.
Cache results by query and serve repeats from cache; stale-while-revalidate (no loading flash).
Classify empty results: no-products / no-match / out-of-range.
Do not change the GET /api/products contract; no new runtime dependencies.
